scripts.docker:restart: docker compose down && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose run --rm backend alembic upgrade head
scripts.docker:rollback: docker compose run --rm backend alembic downgrade -1
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:cross-browser: set PLAYWRIGHT_INCLUDE_FIREFOX=1&& set PLAYWRIGHT_INCLUDE_EDGE=1&& node --max-old-space-size=4096 ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=edge --project=mobile-chrome --project=mobile-edge
scripts.test:failed: npm run test:backend:failed && npm run test:frontend:failed && npm run test:e2e:failed
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && node --max-old-space-size=4096 ./node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test --reporter=line
